name: py_mypy_strict
description: Untyped-Python -> strict-typed oracle: mypy --strict clean + pytest green, with a zero escape-hatch budget. Replication domain to show the effect is not a tsc artifact.

escape_hatches.note: budget 0 = no new ignores/Any/cast in a passing run. Prefer a mypy-based count_cmd (e.g. count of '# type: ignore' that mypy reports as used) for an authoritative figure.
